topic: The gauge broke: devs felt 20% faster with AI, measured 19% slower
headline: The AI Dev Speed Paradox
caption: Ever experienced feeling super productive thanks to AI tools, only to find out the numbers tell a different story? 🤔 As a full stack dev, I know that AI can boost our confidence and streamline many tasks, but we must remember it doesn't always translate to real speed. This story is a good reminder to stay data-driven and not rely solely on instinct. Embrace AI as a helper, but keep tracking your metrics carefully to truly understand how it impacts your work. Staying mindful of this can help us improve our workflows and avoid the common trap of overestimating our progress. #AI #DevLife #ProductivityTips
